root_cause.summary: llms-full personality generation had a 96 URL total budget but did not explicitly guarantee separate 64 A/T variant and 32 A-vs-T comparison cohorts before enrichment and output.
root_cause.impact: The 8 MBTI64 pilot URLs could be exact-present in sitemap.xml and llms.txt while still absent from llms-full.txt.

llms_full_generator: Builds explicit per-locale 32 variant cohorts from CMS includeVariants records, with CMS base-profile derivation only as a non-editorial fallback.
Builds explicit per-locale 16 A-vs-T comparison cohorts from indexable CMS variant records.
Dedupes by normalized path and keeps private/result/order/pay/account/token paths blocked.
Enriches the already-bounded 96 URL cohort without applying another mixed-list truncation.
content_release_revalidation: Personality profile, variant, and comparison release events revalidate the localized personality path.
Personality release events revalidate /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt and clear the llms-full process cache.

expected_post_deploy_check.required_result: 8/8 pilot URLs exact-present in live /llms-full.txt before MBTI64 Search Queue release proceeds
